fraction numerator a over denominator sin A end fraction equals fraction numerator b over denominator sin B end fraction
fraction numerator 5 over denominator sin A end fraction equals fraction numerator 30 over denominator sin 30 end fraction
sin A equals 1
space space space space A space equals 90
space space space space B space equals 180 minus 90 minus 30 space equals 60
space space space space space space space
